name: Oriental Bar-b-q Pork Tenderloin Bbs Xfvf35
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the pork tenderloin of all fat (the sesame oil will prevent burning on the grill).
2. Combine 1/3 cup soy sauce, 1/3 cup sesame oil, 3 minced garlic cloves, ginger, and MSG (if used) in a deep bowl and mix well.
3. Make sure the ginger is not clumping.
4. Place the pork into the marinade and place in the refrigerator for 6 to 8 hours (overnight if preferred).
5. Remove the pork from the marinade and place on a covered grill.
6. Add wet wood to the grill firepan to ensure an adequate supply of smoke.
7. Prepare the sauce: Combine bar-b-q sauce, 1/3 cup sesame oil, 1/3 cup soy sauce, and 1 minced garlic clove in a bowl and mix well.
8. Serve over sliced pork tenderloins.
